arts.ttl: Potential Alfie May reunion for Cheltenham Town in EFL Trophy second round, with Birmingham City one of four possible opponents
arts.sum: Alfie May's Birmingham City - sitting second in League One - are one of four potential opponents for Michael Flynn's Robins in the second round of the Bristol Street Motors Trophy, with the draw taking place on Friday evening. He netted in both of his appearances against Cheltenham last season, helping the Addicks to a win double over his old club, where he netted 67 goals in all competitions including 58 in the league - nearly 20 clear of previous record holder Julian Alsop.

arts.ttl: Preview: Cheltenham Town vs. Tranmere Rovers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's League Two clash between Cheltenham Town and Tranmere Rovers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
